video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Silverbrook, an androgynous coordinator in a formal cloak, steadies a large metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Brightford, a masculine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, uses a safe, blunt repair tool to smooth the shield's edge. Cooperative hands, soft warm forge lighting, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent character appearance and lighting. Yuna Brightford carefully taps the final repair mark on the shield while Yuna Silverbrook maintains a steady, firm grip on the frame. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm atmosphere, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on equipment maintenance. No sexual content, no dangerous tools, no sparks, and no text overlays.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is currently experiencing a bottleneck of repairs; Yuna Silverbrook and Yuna Brightford collaborate to streamline the equipment maintenance process.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successful collaboration on urgent forge repairs builds mutual professional respect.
Coordinated effort effectively resolved the supply bottleneck.
